title: RATi Avatar Stickers Expansion (v1)
description: Telegram sticker pack configuration for avatars. Managed by admin API sticker service.

stickerPack.description: Telegram sticker pack info (created via sticker service).

title.description: Display title for the sticker pack.

stickerCount.description: Number of stickers in the pack.

createdAt.description: Unix timestamp (ms) when the pack was created.

telegramUrl.description: URL to add the sticker pack (e.g., 'https://t.me/addstickers/...').
